texto: It is true, law and war are much alike. War is but a more public kind of lawing; and law is but a more private kind of waring; and both of them remedies of the last refuge.
explicacao: Citação de Daniel Cawdrey sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “It is true, law and war are much alike. War is but a more public kind of lawing; and law is but a…” articula reflexao, law, alike em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
